leadText: Relic Passage (Japanese: 古代の抜け道 Ancient Passage) is a cave-like location in south Unova introduced in Pokémon Black 2 and White 2. It connects Driftveil City with Castelia City via the Pokémon World Tournament and Castelia Sewers, and is also connected to Relic Castle.
